features.name: CLI scaffold with cobra
features.intent: Set up the cobra CLI framework with root command, `analyze` subcommand (path argument), `version` subcommand, and global flags (--output, --format). Entry point for all user interaction.

features.name: NetworkDependency data model
features.intent: Define the core NetworkDependency struct (Source, Target, Port, Protocol, Description, Confidence, SourceFile) and DependencySet type with deduplication and merge logic. This is the lingua franca between parsers and renderers.

features.name: Parser registry and file walker
features.intent: Implement the parser registry that maps file glob patterns to parser functions, and the file walker that recursively scans a directory, matches files to parsers, and collects results. This is the dispatch layer between file discovery and parsing.

features.name: Spring config parser
features.intent: Parse application.yml and application.properties files to extract: datasource URLs (JDBC → host:port), Redis/Kafka/RabbitMQ connection strings, Spring Cloud service URLs, server.port declarations, and custom service endpoint properties. Return []NetworkDependency with high confidence for explicit URLs, medium for inferred.

features.name: Docker Compose parser
features.intent: Parse docker-compose.yml to extract: service definitions with ports, depends_on relationships, environment variables containing URLs/connection strings, network declarations. Map service names to network dependencies between containers.

features.name: Kubernetes manifest parser
features.intent: Parse K8s YAML manifests (Deployment, Service, ConfigMap) to extract: containerPort declarations, Service port/targetPort mappings, env vars and configMapKeyRef values containing URLs, existing service DNS names (svc.namespace.svc.cluster.local patterns).

features.name: Environment file parser
features.intent: Parse .env files to extract connection strings, API URLs, database URLs, and service addresses from KEY=VALUE pairs. Use regex patterns to detect URLs, host:port combos, and well-known environment variable names (DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, KAFKA_BROKERS, etc.).

features.name: Build file dependency inferrer
features.intent: Parse pom.xml and build.gradle to infer infrastructure dependencies from declared libraries. If app uses spring-boot-starter-data-redis → infer Redis (port 6379). If kafka-clients → infer Kafka (port 9092). If postgresql driver → infer Postgres (port 5432). Confidence: low (inferred, not explicit).

features.name: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy renderer
features.intent: Render []NetworkDependency into valid Kubernetes NetworkPolicy YAML. Generate both ingress and egress rules. Handle: port-based rules, namespace selectors for known K8s services, CIDR blocks for external IPs. Output must be valid K8s YAML that passes `kubectl apply --dry-run`.

features.name: Human-readable summary renderer
features.intent: Render []NetworkDependency into a clean, readable terminal summary: service name, list of dependencies (target:port, protocol, confidence, source file), total counts, and any warnings (low confidence items, potential conflicts).

features.name: End-to-end integration and analyze command wiring
features.intent: Wire everything together in the `analyze` command: walk directory → dispatch to parsers → collect dependencies → deduplicate/merge → render output (summary + netpol YAML). Include a sample test fixture (mini Spring Boot app configs) for integration testing.

features.name: LLM-powered dependency analyzer
features.intent: Add --ai flag to analyze command with dual-mode AI: local analysis via Ollama/NuExtract for air-gapped environments, cloud analysis via Gemini Flash for higher accuracy. Auto-detect provider based on available backends. Secret redaction before cloud calls. 30s HTTP timeout.

features.name: GitHub URL auto-clone
features.intent: Allow `segspec analyze <github-url>` to automatically clone the repository to a temp directory and analyze it. Supports HTTPS and git:// URLs with validation and timeout.

features.name: GoReleaser + CI pipeline
features.intent: Set up GoReleaser for automated binary builds and GitHub Releases, plus CI pipeline for test/lint/build on push.

features.name: README documentation
features.intent: Project README with installation, usage, examples, and architecture overview for the v0.1.0 launch.

features.name: Production-valid NetworkPolicy selectors
features.intent: Fix NetworkPolicy renderer to generate proper destination selectors (podSelector, namespaceSelector, ipBlock) instead of empty selectors. Add default-deny base policies. Skip port 0 entries. Add sanitizeName for label-safe names.

features.name: Secret redaction before cloud AI calls
features.intent: Redact secrets, API keys, passwords, and tokens from config file contents before sending to any cloud AI provider. Prevents credential leakage.

features.name: URL validation and git timeouts
features.intent: Validate GitHub URLs before cloning. Add HTTP and git clone timeouts to prevent hanging on bad URLs or unreachable hosts.

features.name: JDBC default port inference
features.intent: When JDBC connection strings omit port, infer default ports (PostgreSQL 5432, MySQL 3306, etc.). Many real-world Spring configs rely on default ports.

features.name: Spring multi-document YAML support
features.intent: Handle Spring YAML files with multiple documents separated by '---' (profile-based configs). Parse all documents, not just the first.

features.name: Spring Boot 3.x Redis config key support
features.intent: Support Spring Boot 3.x redis configuration under spring.data.redis (in addition to the legacy spring.redis key).

features.name: Walker warning return type
features.intent: Change walker.Walk() to return WalkWarning structs alongside dependencies, so the analyze command can display non-fatal warnings (unparseable files, permission errors) to the user.
